home.heroDescription: An authentic inn in the heart of the Bourbonnais region. Comfortable rooms, a welcoming restaurant, and events throughout the year.
home.descriptbar: A warm bar with a friendly atmosphere.
home.descriptresto: Traditional dishes made with local products.
home.descriptevent: Concerts, themed dinners and many other events.
home.descript1: For many years, our establishment has welcomed travelers, families and professionals in a warm and friendly atmosphere.
home.descript2: Enjoy traditional cuisine, comfortable rooms and a peaceful setting in the heart of the Bourbonnais countryside.
home.DescripUniver: The Saint-Aubin Inn welcomes you with three experiences: accommodation, dining and events.
home.carteRestoDescrip: Local products, daily specials and a friendly atmosphere.
home.carteHotelDescrip: Cozy rooms in the heart of the Bourbonnais region.
home.carteEventDescrip: Karaoke nights, themed dinners and events throughout the year.
home.RestoDescript: Discover our menu, daily specials and regional dishes in a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
home.DescriptAvis: A wonderful place! Marion's cooking is outstanding! Be sure to take a stroll through this charming village as well!
home.DescriptAvis2: The staff took excellent care of our family during our stay. They were thoughtful, welcoming and accommodating. Thank you to the whole team! The setting is beautiful and the meals were excellent. We'll definitely be back!
home.DescriptAvis3: A fantastic place with delicious food and very friendly owners.

hotel.DescripHotel: Enjoy a peaceful and comfortable stay in the heart of the Bourbonnais in one of our charming rooms.
hotel.Dimanchetexte: Lunch and dinner are not available on Sundays.

reservation.inforestoD: Your stay includes one or more Sundays.
reservation.inforestoD2: L'Auberge de Saint-Aubin does not provide lunch or dinner service on Sundays.
reservation.inforestoD3: Please plan your meals outside the hotel.
reservation.inforestoD4: Breakfast is still served as usual.
reservation.ArrIndis2: Sunday arrivals are not available at L'Auberge de Saint-Aubin.
reservation.infoD: Events are scheduled during your stay.
reservation.infoD2: They may result in increased noise or higher visitor numbers.
reservation.infoD3: I have read and understood this information.
